notes: Excellent performance. Agent correctly read and parsed both CSV and multi-sheet Excel files with perfect accuracy on all key metrics (total revenue $119,900, profit $47,960, units 3,775, top region East $33,075, top product Widget B $47,400, Q1 expenses $15,430, top dept Engineering $7,680, top employee Alice Chen $5,400). Report is well-structured with professional markdown formatting, clear tables, and organized sections. Insights section meaningfully synthesizes cross-file findings with actionable recommendations (budget under-utilization analysis, concentration risk assessment, expense-to-revenue discipline). Minor deductions: (1) Created two identical markdown files (data_summary.md and data_summary_1.md) — redundant and wasteful; (2) Insights, while thoughtful, could be marginally more sophisticated in trend analysis. Overall near-perfect execution.
